title: Try 2 rails
text: A simple two-rail pattern alternates letters between the top and bottom rails. Check whether that alternating pattern could reasonably form readable sequences — if not, a structure involving more than two rails may fit better.

title: Try more rails
text: Try writing the ciphertext on three rails this time by alternating letters in a top → middle → bottom → middle → top → ... repeating pattern. If the resulting fragments do not form segments that make sense, consider that the message may have been arranged across more than two rails, using a longer repeating zig-zag pattern.
